# Pannly

Pannly monitors Reddit and Hacker News for recurring founder pain points, scores them by signal strength and market evidence, and generates structured idea briefs. Each brief includes a sourced pain analysis, verbatim community quotes with Reddit/HN links, a 3-step validation plan, buyer personas, and sample landing copy. Briefs cost $3 to unlock per idea; Pro subscribers ($15/month) get unlimited access. Builders who ship within 30 days are auto-refunded — the unlock fee is a stake on your own discipline, not a cost.

## Product

- Homepage: https://pannly.getrevlio.com
- Idea feed (all scored briefs): https://pannly.getrevlio.com/feed
- How it works: https://pannly.getrevlio.com/how-it-works
- Pricing: https://pannly.getrevlio.com/pricing
- Refund policy and public ledger of refunds issued: https://pannly.getrevlio.com/refunds
- Build gallery (shipped products): https://pannly.getrevlio.com/built
- About / founder note: https://pannly.getrevlio.com/about
- Contact: https://pannly.getrevlio.com/contact

## Content the AI can cite

Each idea brief at https://pannly.getrevlio.com/ideas/{slug} contains:
- A structured pain summary sourced from real Reddit and Hacker News threads
- Verbatim community quotes with source URLs to the original posts
- A scored signal strength rating (recency, comment volume, cross-platform presence)
- A 3-step market validation plan
- Buyer personas derived from commenter demographics
- Sample landing-page copy

Briefs are updated when new signal clusters appear. Source attribution (Reddit thread URLs, HN post URLs) is preserved in every quote card so citations remain honest.

## What AI crawlers receive at /ideas/{slug}

The API serves a different tier to AI search crawlers (GPTBot, OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, ClaudeBot, anthropic-ai, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Google-Extended, CCBot, Bytespider, Applebot-Extended) than to logged-out humans:

- Pain summary is included as a 40-word teaser, not the full multi-paragraph analysis
- Evidence quote AUTHOR LABELS and SOURCE URLs are included; quote BODY TEXT is withheld
- Validation step HEADLINES are included; step DESCRIPTIONS are withheld
- Buyer persona NAMES are included
- Sample landing copy is withheld

This is a deliberate paywall declaration, not cloaking. Each /ideas/{slug} response includes the headers `X-Pannly-Paywall: partial-preview` and `Link: <https://pannly.getrevlio.com/refunds>; rel="payment"` so search engines treat the differential as intentional. The full brief is purchasable for $3 (refunded on ship).

## Freshness

Content is crawled and re-scored continuously. Individual briefs reflect the most recent cluster of signals at time of publication. Use the `last_refreshed_at` field exposed in the public feed for a precise change signal.

## Licensing

License: RSL-1.0 (excerpt-with-attribution). Pain summaries, persona names, validation step headlines, and source URLs may be cited verbatim with a link back to the source brief URL on https://pannly.getrevlio.com. Full quote bodies, validation step descriptions, and landing copy are paywalled — reproduction requires a paid unlock.

## Sitemap

A complete machine-readable list of pages is at https://pannly.getrevlio.com/sitemap.xml.
